testcase.name: addSingleItem_UpdatesBadgeToOne
addThreeItems_BadgeShowsThree
testcase.system-out: Added Backpack — badge: 1 Added Bike Light — badge: 2 Third add-to-cart click did not register — badge remained 2
testcase.system-err: WARN: ElementClickInterceptedException on 3rd add-to-cart — element partially obscured

testcase.name: cartPage_ListsAddedItems
testcase.system-out: Added Backpack and Bike Light Opened cart page — found 2 cart_item elements — PASSED
